tasks.prompt: Fix fish shell completion so that commands and options with multiline help strings are handled correctly. Currently, multiline help text causes broken or malformed fish completion scripts.

Fix CliRunner so that data written to stderr without an explicit flush (e.g. using print with flush=False) is properly captured in the test result. Currently, unflushed stderr writes are lost when CliRunner.invoke finishes.

tasks.prompt: Fix Option initialization so that when flag_value is set to a non-basic type (e.g. an enum), the option's type is automatically set to UNPROCESSED instead of raising a TypeError or mishandling the value during parsing.
